plugin.name: Document Bridge
plugin.description: Convert Markdown reports into DOCX files and DOCX documents back into Markdown.
ui.title: Document Bridge
ui.description: Convert Markdown reports to DOCX and convert DOCX documents back to Markdown without leaving the toolkit.
ui.mode.label: Mode
ui.source.label: Source File
ui.output.label: Output File

ui.layout.label: Layout Direction
ui.font.label: Preferred Font
ui.extract_images: Extract embedded images into a sibling media folder
ui.summary.ready.md_to_docx: Choose a markdown file and an output location to generate a DOCX document.
ui.summary.ready.docx_to_md: Choose a DOCX file and an output location to generate a markdown file.
ui.summary.success.md_to_docx: Created DOCX output with {headings} headings, {tables} tables, and {images} images.
ui.summary.success.docx_to_md: Created Markdown output with {headings} headings, {tables} tables, and {images} extracted images.
